description: Bridge content.v2 exports into frontend-consumable artifacts for video, sentence bank, dictionary, and knowledge lab, without reworking already-stabilized generators.
notes: 2026-04-25 audit: content-pipeline already has core/i18n split emission logic for learning_library (e04a3f3) and video sync helpers exist. Do not reimplement stable exporters.
Current risk is frontend consumption still pointing at legacy manifest/package shapes; keep this task focused on the remaining export-contract and sync gap.

tasks.desc: Audit the current pipeline outputs and mark which domains already emit content.v2 artifacts (video, sentence bank, dictionary, knowledge lab) versus which still point at legacy wrappers.
notes: 2026-04-25 audit: learning_library emits split core/i18n artifacts. Video syncs to production packages. Dictionary uses core/i18n split in production packages. Frontend consumption of learning_library is manifest-aware but needs DTO and fallback refinement.

tasks.desc: Freeze the canonical frontend export contract: core/i18n file ownership, manifest filename(s), and domain-specific output roots for video, sentence bank, dictionary, and knowledge lab.
notes: Primary manifest: library_manifest.json (V5). Fallback: manifest.json (V4). Artifacts remain in domain-specific roots.

tasks.desc: Verify or extend the missing export/sync adapter(s) in content-pipeline / release-aggregator only where gaps remain, so content.v2 artifacts land in frontend-consumable core/i18n locations without rewriting already-stable generators.
notes: Verified video and dictionary sync helpers; verified core/i18n split emission for learning_library.

tasks.desc: Wire the frontend intake consumer(s) to the exported artifacts and preserve a safe fallback path to legacy assets during rollout.
notes: Implemented _normalizeRoot for V5 flat JSON support; updated LessonRegistryRepository to discover video lessons from manifest.json.

tasks.desc: Run smoke verification across video, sentence bank, dictionary, and knowledge lab outputs, then record any remaining legacy-path fallbacks and gaps.
notes: Confirmed Learning Library hierarchy mapping; verified Dictionary case-sensitivity handling.
